from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, ProcessPoolExecutor

_shared_thread_pool = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=8)
_shared_process_pool = ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=4)

def fetch_all(urls: list[str]) -> list[bytes]:
    results = list(_shared_thread_pool.map(fetch_url, urls))
    return results

def fetch_url(url: str) -> bytes:
    import requests
    return requests.get(url).content

def process_batch(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    futures = [_shared_process_pool.submit(transform, item) for item in items]
    return [f.result() for f in futures]

def transform(item: dict) -> dict:
    return {k: str(v).upper() for k, v in item.items()}

def parallel_compute(data_chunks: list[list[float]]) -> list[float]:
    results = list(_shared_process_pool.map(compute_sum, data_chunks))
    return results

def compute_sum(chunk: list[float]) -> float:
    return sum(chunk)

def bulk_download(files: list[str]) -> list[bytes]:
    return list(_shared_thread_pool.map(download_file, files))

def download_file(path: str) -> bytes:
    with open(path, "rb") as f:
        return f.read()
